titleStmt.title: SII 9.413: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 413. (A.R. No. 374 of 1921.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE ALANKARA-MANDAPA BEFORE THE TRIPURASAMHARA IMAGE IN THE TIRUVIRATTANESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVADI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Sādhāraṇa, Pushya, śu. 13, Maṁ[gaḷavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1370 December 31 Tuesday. It records that Dugaṇṇadēva, (manager) of the house of Kaṁpaṇṇa-Voḍeya, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya, made a gift of the village of Sātipaṭu in Kīḷe-Āṇimjegāḍipaṭṭu for the service of the god Modalīsvaramoḍeya-Nāyanār of Tiruvadi and placed it in charge of the sthānika of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanma(ma)hāmāṁḍaḷēśvara Āri
rāyavibhāḍa śrīvīrabukaṁṇnaOḍeya
ra komāra kampaṁṇavoḍēra maneya
sādhāraṇasaṁvachyarada tayimāsa
5 diyalū pusya su 13 maṁ śrīmatu
dugaṁṇadēvaru tiruvadiya vodalīsva
ramoḍeyanāyanāruge Ā stānikarige koṭṭa sa
ṁste Ā dēvara Āṁgaraṁgabhōgakke Āmrutapaḍi
ge sādhāraṇasaṁvachyarada Āḍi Ārabhya
vāgi koṭṭa grāma kīḷeĀṇiṁjegāḍipaṭṭana sā
tipaṭu nāyaparipālanāda grāma 1 kaṁ prāku hāḷāgidda
saṁmaṁda Ā dēvara Āṁgaraṁgabhōgake Āmrutapaḍige sa
rvvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi dhārāpūrvakavāgi Ā ravica
śinuḷa(ṁ)nnaka naḍaudu Āru tapidaru gaṁgeyalli kapileya koṁda
vanu madhupānaṁ māḍidavanu nobanu gūṇa . kali
Digital edition of SII 9.413 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
